company_name: 追觅科技（苏州）有限公司
message: The official social and campus recruitment portals were verified and official job-detail routes were observed, but public HTML returned only the recruitment-site title and no auditable role rows or core position fields.
recommended_action: retry with a compliant public-data resolver for the official Zhiye portal; do not log in, submit captcha, or bypass access controls

company_name: 安克创新科技股份有限公司
message: The official recruitment site exposed social and campus entry points; the parsed social page reported zero roles while an official detail route existed without a resolved body, so zero parsed rows cannot yet be treated as a final no-job conclusion.
recommended_action: resolve the public client-rendered inventory and official detail routes without authentication or access-control bypass; create no jobs until core fields are auditable

company_name: 深圳传音控股股份有限公司
message: The official company and employee-development pages were verified, but no current official position inventory, unique job-detail URL, application-state evidence, or auditable official recruitment announcement was located.
recommended_action: continue only through official company career pages, official recruitment announcements, or official regulatory disclosures; do not use third-party reposts or applicant-specific notification systems as JobImport evidence

company_name: 广州视源电子科技股份有限公司
message: A public official campus position route and application entry were observed, but the public HTML did not expose the role title, responsibilities, requirements, city, education, experience, publication date, deadline, or salary disclosure fields.
recommended_action: resolve position-level fields from the public official portal before creating candidate_raw; do not infer any missing field or salary
